basic_details.job_title: DRDO ARDE Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 24 Junior Research Fellow & Research Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Armament Research & Development Establishment (ARDE), Pune, a premier laboratory under the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), has invited applications from Indian Nationals for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Research Associate (RA) positions through Advertisement No. ARDE/JRF-RA/2026. A total of 24 vacancies are available across Electronics, Computer Science, Mechanical/Metallurgy, Aerospace, and RF/Microwave disciplines. Applications must be sent offline by post.

age_limit.details: Post Maximum Age (as on date of interview) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) 28 years Research Associate (RA) 35 years | Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates Age relaxation: 3 years for OBC candidates

qualification.details: Candidates must be Indian Nationals meeting the educational qualification and age limit specified for the post they are applying for. | Candidates with M.Sc./B.E./B.Tech qualifications must hold a valid UGC/CSIR/NET/GATE score. | Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates Age relaxation: 3 years for OBC candidates

vacancy_details.Discipline/Field: Electronics / Electronics & Communication / Applied Physics / Applied Optics (Laser & Fiber Optics/Photonics)
Computer Science / IT / Data Science / AI & ML / Cyber Security / Big Data Analysis
Mechanical / Metallurgy / Material Science / Manufacturing / Production Engineering

discipline_wise_breakdown.discipline_field: Electronics / Electronics & Communication / Applied Physics / Applied Optics (Laser & Fiber Optics/Photonics)
Computer Science / IT / Data Science / AI & ML / Cyber Security / Big Data Analysis
Mechanical / Metallurgy / Material Science / Manufacturing / Production Engineering

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000 per month Research Associate (RA): Rs. 67,000 per month | HRA, medical facilities, and contingency grant are also admissible as per applicable rules. The fellowship is initially for two years, extendable as per rules for JRF.

selection_process: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview and/or written test. Interview/written test dates will be communicated only via email to shortlisted candidates. Selected candidates must bring a copy of their Bio-data and original certificates for verification at the time of the interview.
The notification does not provide further details of the written test pattern
how_to_apply: Download/obtain the Bio-data proforma as given in the official advertisement.
Fill the Bio-data in your own handwriting, including personal details, educational qualifications (from Matric/10th onwards), experience (if any), and NET/GATE/CSIR/UGC qualification details.
Affix a recent passport-size photograph on the right top corner of the Bio-data.
Attach self-attested copies of all relevant certificates.
Sign the declaration section of the form.
Superscribe the name of the post applied for on the envelope.
Send the completed application to: The Director, Armament Research & Development Establishment (ARDE), Armament Post, Pashan, Pune - 411 021
Ensure the application reaches the office on or before 31st August 2026 (Monday).
important_instructions: Fellowship offer does not confer any right to absorption in DRDO. Shortlisted candidates called for interview/written test are eligible for reimbursement of actual train/bus fare by the shortest route, limited to sleeper class railway fare, from the place mentioned in the interview letter or the place the journey started from, whichever is less, as per rules. Candidates must be ready to take up duties assigned anywhere in India. Furnishing false or concealed information can lead to summary termination of the fellowship without prior notice.

rows.details: Armament Research & Development Establishment (ARDE), Pune - a DRDO Lab
Initially 2 years (extendable as per rules for JRF)

content_sections.heading: ARDE Pune Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: In addition to the stipend, HRA, medical facilities, and a contingency grant are admissible for both JRF and RA positions, as per applicable rules.

rows.discipline_field: Electronics / Electronics & Communication / Applied Physics / Applied Optics (Laser & Fiber Optics/Photonics)
Computer Science / IT / Data Science / AI & ML / Cyber Security / Big Data Analysis
Mechanical / Metallurgy / Material Science / Manufacturing / Production Engineering

content_sections.heading: ARDE Pune JRF & RA Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must be Indian Nationals meeting the educational qualification and age limit specified for the post they are applying for. Candidates with M.Sc./B.E./B.Tech qualifications must hold a valid UGC/CSIR/NET/GATE score. Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates Age relaxation: 3 years for OBC candidates

rows.qualification_required: B.E./B.Tech in Electronics/Electronics & Communication/Applied Electronics/Signal Processing/Microwave/Microelectronics/Power Electronics/Instrumentation & Control/Applied Physics/Applied Optics (Laser & Fiber Optics/Photonics) in first division with NET/GATE; OR M.Sc. in equivalent disciplines in first division with NET/GATE; OR M.Tech/M.E. in equivalent disciplines in first division at both graduate and postgraduate level.

B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/Computer Engg./IT/Computer Applications/Information Science/Data Science/Software Engg./Cyber Security/AI & ML/Big Data Analysis with NET/GATE; OR M.Sc. (Computer Science) in first division with NET/GATE.

B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical/Metallurgy/Metallurgical Engg./Material Engg./Material Science/Manufacturing Engg./Production Engg. in first division with NET/GATE; OR M.E./M.Tech in equivalent disciplines in first division at both graduate and postgraduate level.
B.E./B.Tech in Aeronautical/Aerospace Engineering in first division with NET/GATE; OR M.Tech/M.E. in Aeronautical/Aerospace Engineering in first division at both graduate and postgraduate level.

Ph.D. in Electronics Engg. from a reputed institution, OR M.E./M.Tech with a minimum of 3 years' R&D experience in a reputed institution. Candidates who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis may also apply, but the associateship will be awarded only after the degree is conferred, within the validity period of the offer. At least one research paper publication in a JCR/SCI-listed refereed journal is mandatory. Experience in RF/Microwaves/Antenna is desirable.

content_sections.heading: ARDE Pune Stipend/ Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000 per month Research Associate (RA): Rs. 67,000 per month HRA, medical facilities, and contingency grant are also admissible as per applicable rules. The fellowship is initially for two years, extendable as per rules for JRF.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: As per the notification: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview and/or written test. Interview/written test dates will be communicated only via email to shortlisted candidates. Selected candidates must bring a copy of their Bio-data and original certificates for verification at the time of the interview. The notification does not provide further details of the written test pattern, syllabus, or interview weightage.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates must send their CV/Bio-data (as per the enclosed proforma, filled in the candidate's own handwriting) along with self-attested copies of: Educational qualification certificates NET/GATE scorecard Caste certificate (if applicable) Other relevant documents supporting claims made in the application A recent passport-size photograph affixed on the right top corner of the Bio-data Candidates currently employed in Government/Public Sector Undertakings/Autonomous Bodies must bring a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their current employer.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Fellowship offer does not confer any right to absorption in DRDO. Shortlisted candidates called for interview/written test are eligible for reimbursement of actual train/bus fare by the shortest route, limited to sleeper class railway fare, from the place mentioned in the interview letter or the place the journey started from, whichever is less, as per rules. Candidates must be ready to take up duties assigned anywhere in India. Furnishing false or concealed information can lead to summary termination of the fellowship without prior notice.

content_sections.heading: Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Notification: Click here Official Website: Click here

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ARDE Pune JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the application to reach the ARDE office is 31st August 2026 (Monday).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in ARDE Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 24 total vacancies - 23 for Junior Research Fellow (across Electronics, Computer Science, Mechanical, and Aerospace disciplines) and 1 for Research Associate.

faq.question: Q3. What is the stipend for JRF and RA at ARDE Pune?
faq.answer: JRF stipend is Rs. 37,000 per month, and RA stipend is Rs. 67,000 per month, along with HRA, medical facilities, and contingency grant as per rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for ARDE Pune JRF and RA posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age is 28 years for JRF and 35 years for RA, as on the date of interview, with relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for ARDE Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for ARDE Pune JRF/RA posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent offline by post using the prescribed Bio-data proforma, addressed to The Director, ARDE, Armament Post, Pashan, Pune – 411 021, with the post name superscribed on the envelope.

faq.question: Q7. Is NET/GATE mandatory for ARDE Pune JRF posts?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with B.E./B.Tech or M.Sc. qualifications must hold a valid UGC/CSIR/NET/GATE score. M.Tech/M.E. candidates in first division at both graduate and postgraduate level are also eligible without a separate NET/GATE requirement, as specified for each discipline.

faq.question: Q8. Does the ARDE fellowship guarantee a permanent job in DRDO?
faq.answer: No. The notification clearly states that the offer of fellowship does not confer any right for absorption in DRDO.

faq.question: Q9. Will travel expenses be reimbursed for the interview?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates called for interview/written test are eligible for reimbursement of actual train/bus fare by the shortest route, limited to sleeper class fare, as per rules.

faq.question: Q10. How will candidates know if they are shortlisted?
faq.answer: Interview/written test dates will be sent through email only to shortlisted candidates.
